stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — dev deliverable shipped (PR #40 merge 2026-06-17T21:14:04Z). Owner apply step on 192.168.1.199 pending (post-Sprint-1).

stories.title: Engine module (4 ops, decimal precision)
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — engine module merged via PR #26 (commit be90555, 2026-06-17T19:01:47Z). M1 acceptance (0.1+0.2 = 0.3) green. Extended in Sprint 2 by STORY-011 (transcendentals + factorial + DomainError via PR #117).

stories.title: Keyboard-first web shell (family tracker)
depends_on: STORY-001 (VM hardening — ufw HTTP port + SSH key auth)
ADR-0018 (front-end framework decision — Accepted via PR #13)
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — split into STORY-003a (5 SP) + STORY-003b (3 SP), both shipped. M3 acceptance (keyboard-only) green. Family tracker #17 closable by orchestrator.

stories.title: Web shell — core (FastAPI + 3 components + keyboard FSM)
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — merged 2026-06-18T04:37:00Z. Includes d007 observability (issue #35). 65 contract tests green.

stories.title: Web shell — deferred (3 components + Playwright E2E + LAN-bind)
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — merged 2026-06-18T11:54:53Z. Playwright E2E + LAN-bind green.

stories.title: Front-end framework ADR
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — vanilla JS + Web Components selected via ADR-0018 (PR #13 merged 2026-06-17T17:19:13Z). R-1 housekeeping flipped to Accepted at commit 9241d76.

stories.title: Doctrine — verdict:* sentinel label (Option A)
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — design shipped via PR #36 (merged 2026-06-17T20:09:39Z). Option C implementation cancelled by owner via Issue #38. Superseded by ADR-0024 verdict-by:<ts> schema (PR #108 + PR #98) in Sprint 2.

stories.title: Watcher dedup fix completion
blocks: Clean event stream for Sprint 1 (every agent benefits)
stories.notes: Sprint 1 DONE — content-hash ID fix shipped via PR #9. Dedup working in production.

stories.title: Persistent cross-device history (SQLite backend)
depends_on: ADR-0019 R-3 HTTP API contract (Accepted, PR #33 + PR #63 amendment)
ADR-0022 Persistence layer ADR (Accepted — was 'R-5' placeholder pre-Sprint-2)
stories.notes: Sprint 2 DONE — shipped via PR #88 (commit merged 2026-06-19, M5 acceptance green). ADR-0022 (formerly R-5 placeholder) Accepted with shared-SQLite backend per PM recommendation.

stories.title: History UI wiring (render + substring search + click-to-load)
stories.notes: Sprint 2 DONE — shipped via PR #111 (merged 2026-06-19T11:21:14Z, commit c5e0ac4). M5 perf budget (1000+ records substring search <100ms p95) green per PR #111 test results.

stories.title: Skin system — ≥3 built-in skins (Dark, Light, Retro) + mode-toggle wired
depends_on: ADR-0019 R-3 HTTP API contract (GET /api/skin, PUT /api/skin endpoints)
stories.notes: Sprint 2 DONE — shipped via PR #112 (merged 2026-06-19, commit ccad569). 3 CSS skin files + auto-discovery + Idempotency-Key header per ADR-0019. MVP-1 partial was shipped earlier via PR #37 (now superseded by PR #112 full impl).

stories.title: Skin preference persistence (cross-session + cross-device)
depends_on: ADR-0022 Persistence layer ADR (recommended shared SQLite — was 'R-5' placeholder pre-Sprint-2)
stories.notes: Sprint 2 DONE — shipped via PR #118. SQLite-backed skin state in src/atilcalc/persistence/skin.py per ADR-0022. Cross-device sync via shared SQLite file (NFS-equivalent). Design open question (localStorage vs SQLite) resolved at sizing in favor of SQLite per M4 cross-device clause.

stories.title: Scientific functions (trig / log / √ / !) — engine + UI affordances
vision_metrics: M2 (broader workflows — scientific functions unlock trig/log use cases)
stories.notes: Sprint 2 DONE — shipped via PR #117. Engine + API surface for sin/cos/tan/log/ln/sqrt/factorial via mpmath==1.3.0. DomainError exception per ADR-0019 amend-2. Single-letter scientific handlers (s/c/t/l/n/r/!) added in PR #122 (STORY-012 follow-up). Vision §Open Questions Q3 (scientific functions placement) implicitly answered by Sprint 1 plan.md: 'Out of scope: Scientific functions — Sprint 2 per owner Q3 answer.'

stories.title: Owner-facing documentation pass (README + in-app help + keyboard shortcuts reference)
stories.notes: Sprint 2 DONE — shipped via PR #122 (merged 2026-06-19T18:33:04Z, commit 34f4073). All 5 ACs (README + USER-GUIDE + in-app help + shortcuts.js registry + markdown lint) green. ADR-0023 implementation shipped as part of this PR; status flip Proposed→Accepted is a small follow-up. Branch contamination fix mid-PR (re-branch from main) noted in PR #122 body — Sprint 2 retro item.

stories.title: Issue #48 — Template port: Sprint 1+2 lessons → dev-studio-template
stories.notes: Sprint 1 retro gate is now met. Sprint 2 retro (RETRO-003) is the remaining gate. Per Sprint 1 retro: '.claude/CLAUDE.md.tmpl' updates with verdict-by schema, atomic hand-off, queue-empty wake; '.claude/agents/*.md.tmpl' updates with Sprint 2 PM/architect/dev/tester patterns.

plan_source: docs/sprints/sprint-01/plan.md (Sprint 1, merged) → docs/sprints/sprint-02/plan.md (Sprint 2, ACTIVE) → docs/sprints/sprint-03/proposed-scope.md (Sprint 3, awaiting sizing ceremony)
sprint_2_retro_doc: docs/sprints/sprint-02/retrospective.md (to be drafted by PM via RETRO-003)
notes: Sprint 1: 8 stories filed (STORY-001/002/003/003a/003b/004/005/006), all DONE. Sprint 2: 6 PM-authored feature stories groomed (STORY-007/008/009/010/011/012), 23 SP proposed, ALL 6 SHIPPED via PR #88/#111/#112/#117/#118/#122 by 2026-06-19T18:33:04Z. MVP-1 features complete (M1+M2+M3+M4+M5 all shipped). Sprint 3: PM-groomed 2026-06-19T18:45:00Z with 4 deploy stories (DEPLOY-001/002/003/004 = 9 SP) + 1 retro doc (RETRO-003 = 1 SP) + 1 template port (Issue #48 = 3 SP) = 13 SP proposed. Sprint 3 is operational hardening + retro ceremony, NOT feature work — closes the prod-liveness gap (Issue #127 / ADR-0027). Architect-owned chore work tracked separately in issues (#46 closed, #65 done, #45 in flight, #48 unblocked by RETRO-003). Sprint 2 retro pending (RETRO-003 in Sprint 3 backlog).
